description_long: This is a modern rectangular table with a transparent glass top supported by a distinctive crossed wooden base. The tabletop is sleek and flat, providing a clear view of the intricate support structure beneath. The base consists of intersecting wooden beams arranged in an X-pattern, lending both stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The wood appears to be finished with a smooth, polished surface, contrasting with the glossy, reflective glass. The table's design is minimalistic, with no visible drawers or additional features, emphasizing clean lines and open space. This piece would fit well in urban parks, plazas, or upscale outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern rectangular glass-top table with a crossed wooden base and a sleek, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the glass top and the linear arrangement of the crossed wooden supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the X-shaped wooden base and the narrow profile of the glass tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the glass top and the wooden support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with a clear look at the intersecting wooden legs.
